## Meeting Purpose

[Catch-up and explore potential collaboration between Jason Gong (GrowthX.ai) and Talal Syed (csvnow.com).](https://fathom.video/share/tru8p8D6C5qjnnHt-4tLEsiQ8UqQ_yzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX.ai is scaling rapidly, managing 50+ accounts with plans for agency growth, product development, and community expansion](https://fathom.video/share/tru8p8D6C5qjnnHt-4tLEsiQ8UqQ_yzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Talal's agency (csvnow.com) is smaller but focused on challenging, unorthodox work with 5 current clients](https://fathom.video/share/tru8p8D6C5qjnnHt-4tLEsiQ8UqQ_yzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai needs to improve SEO processes, automation, and strategy consistency across accounts](https://fathom.video/share/tru8p8D6C5qjnnHt-4tLEsiQ8UqQ_yzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Potential for collaboration explored, with visa considerations (Talal on O-1) to be factored in](https://fathom.video/share/tru8p8D6C5qjnnHt-4tLEsiQ8UqQ_yzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX.ai's Current State and Growth

  - [Managing 50+ accounts with pod structure (director, mid-level SEO, writers)](https://fathom.video/share/tru8p8D6C5qjnnHt-4tLEsiQ8UqQ_yzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Jason manages 3 largest clients: Blood Flow, Augment Code, Surge AI](https://fathom.video/share/tru8p8D6C5qjnnHt-4tLEsiQ8UqQ_yzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [Scaling agency, developing own product, investing in community](https://fathom.video/share/tru8p8D6C5qjnnHt-4tLEsiQ8UqQ_yzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Challenges in finding "AI native marketers" with technical and SEO skills](https://fathom.video/share/tru8p8D6C5qjnnHt-4tLEsiQ8UqQ_yzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)

### Talal's Agency (csvnow.com) Overview

  - [Small team: Talal + 2 part-time staff](https://fathom.video/share/tru8p8D6C5qjnnHt-4tLEsiQ8UqQ_yzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [5 current clients, focused on challenging, unorthodox work](https://fathom.video/share/tru8p8D6C5qjnnHt-4tLEsiQ8UqQ_yzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [Prefers fractional roles (e.g., fractional head of SEO) and enterprise partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/tru8p8D6C5qjnnHt-4tLEsiQ8UqQ_yzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)
  - [Optimizing for learning and enjoyment, not just scaling for margin](https://fathom.video/share/tru8p8D6C5qjnnHt-4tLEsiQ8UqQ_yzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)

### SEO and Content Strategy Challenges

  - [GrowthX.ai lacks consistent SEO processes across accounts](https://fathom.video/share/tru8p8D6C5qjnnHt-4tLEsiQ8UqQ_yzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
  - [No regular site audits for \~70% of accounts](https://fathom.video/share/tru8p8D6C5qjnnHt-4tLEsiQ8UqQ_yzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [Need for automated tools and playbooks for baseline monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/tru8p8D6C5qjnnHt-4tLEsiQ8UqQ_yzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [Strategy reset and feedback loops are currently ad hoc](https://fathom.video/share/tru8p8D6C5qjnnHt-4tLEsiQ8UqQ_yzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
  - [Blend of AEO (AI-Enhanced Optimization) and SEO strategies needed](https://fathom.video/share/tru8p8D6C5qjnnHt-4tLEsiQ8UqQ_yzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Developing repeatable SEO playbooks and processes](https://fathom.video/share/tru8p8D6C5qjnnHt-4tLEsiQ8UqQ_yzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [Creating automated workflows for technical SEO auditing](https://fathom.video/share/tru8p8D6C5qjnnHt-4tLEsiQ8UqQ_yzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Establishing consistent strategy approach encompassing SEO and AEO](https://fathom.video/share/tru8p8D6C5qjnnHt-4tLEsiQ8UqQ_yzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)
  - [Potential for Talal to join GrowthX.ai in a flexible capacity](https://fathom.video/share/tru8p8D6C5qjnnHt-4tLEsiQ8UqQ_yzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1601.0)

### Visa Considerations

  - [Talal currently on O-1 visa, would need sponsorship for full-time role](https://fathom.video/share/tru8p8D6C5qjnnHt-4tLEsiQ8UqQ_yzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
  - [Options include O-1 transfer or exploring EB-1 green card process](https://fathom.video/share/tru8p8D6C5qjnnHt-4tLEsiQ8UqQ_yzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1504.0)
  - [Jason shared his visa history (TN, O-1, now on EAD for EB-1A)](https://fathom.video/share/tru8p8D6C5qjnnHt-4tLEsiQ8UqQ_yzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Talal to consider collaboration options and reach out in 1-2 days](https://fathom.video/share/tru8p8D6C5qjnnHt-4tLEsiQ8UqQ_yzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up call, potentially including Marcel from GrowthX.ai](https://fathom.video/share/tru8p8D6C5qjnnHt-4tLEsiQ8UqQ_yzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
  - [Jason to outline specific needs for potential part-time collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/tru8p8D6C5qjnnHt-4tLEsiQ8UqQ_yzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
  - [Explore visa sponsorship options if moving towards full-time engagement](https://fathom.video/share/tru8p8D6C5qjnnHt-4tLEsiQ8UqQ_yzJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
